args.query:
SELECT ep.emotion, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.emotion ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE(p.posted_at) as post_date, p.platform, COUNT(*) as post_count
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY post_date, p.platform ORDER BY post_date

SELECT ep.sentiment, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.sentiment ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT theme, COUNT(*) as mentions,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep, UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY theme ORDER BY mentions DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT ep.sentiment, p.platform, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.sentiment, p.platform ORDER BY count DESC
